scope: Google Search Console only (bariatriccounselingcenter.com), derived from 43 GSC snapshots 2026-05-07 -> 2026-07-01 plus the keywords-master tracked list. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections are intentionally NOT auto-generated here and remain manual.
wins: Three core local commercial terms hold the #2-3 tier: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' @1.6, 'bariatric counseling san antonio' @2.0, and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' @2.0 (up from 25.3 a month ago).
Strong MoM recoveries on commercial-intent terms: 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' 23.0 -> 4.5 and 'bariatric therapist' now @4.0; the #2-3 tier grew from 2 to 3 terms vs the 2026-06-29 run.

Blog content is pulling page-1 impressions at volume: the better-sleep-for-weight-loss post drew 1,338 impressions @14.7, weight-loss-medications 833 impressions @11.0, and the self-esteem post 777 impressions @7.7 (its 6 clicks are the single best-converting page).
Keyword coverage ticked up to 26 of 75 tracked keywords with GSC data (from 24 on 2026-06-29); total impressions 1,573 vs 1,447 on the prior run.
needs_attention: Coverage is 26 of 75 tracked KEYWORDS showing impressions; 49 show none. This is a KEYWORD count, not a page count. Page hygiene is largely clean: of 48 distinct target pages only 2 still point at staging, and staging-targeted tracker URLs are almost always stale pointers to pages already live on www, not lost traffic.

CTR is near zero: 3 clicks on 1,573 impressions today (~0.2%), and even the strong 2026-06-29 day (3,724 impressions) yielded only 24 clicks. High-impression pages are surfacing but not earning the click.

Slipped commercial terms with real impressions: 'bariatric counseling' pos 16.8 delta -4.3 (43 impressions, the highest-impression tracked term), 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' 23.8 delta -7.4 (12 imp), 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' 27.8 delta -3.8 (12 imp), and 'weight loss counseling or therapy' 16.5 delta -11.2 (8 imp).

CAVEAT: the last two snapshots (06-30 @1,519 imp and 07-01 @1,573 imp / pos 31.64) are partial GSC data from the usual 2-3 day reporting lag, versus 06-29's full 3,724 imp @16.94 - so today's inflated avg position is a lag artifact, not a real drop. Low/single-impression positions also swing day to day and are directional only.
priority_actions: CTR fix (highest leverage): add CTAs and internal links from the high-impression blog posts (better-sleep 1,338 imp, weight-loss-medications 833 imp) into the matching service pages (bariatric counseling, GLP-1/medication) to convert page-1 impressions into clicks.
Defend the three core local #2-3 terms (bariatric counseling SA, weight loss counseling SA, bariatric surgery counseling SA) - these are the money terms and are one slip away from page-2 competition.

On-page refresh for slipped terms with real impressions: 'bariatric counseling' (43 imp, -4.3) and 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' (-7.4) - strengthen the target pages with BCC-specific copy and internal links.

Tracker hygiene: only 2 of 48 target pages still point at staging; repoint those 2 targetUrls in keywords-master.json to the correct live www URLs so GSC can match. If a staging->prod publish backlog is suspected, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes rather than inferring a count.
Add FAQ schema to core service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
summary: Core local commercial terms are healthy (three in the #2-3 tier, led by 'weight loss counseling san antonio' up 25.3->2.0) and blog content is pulling strong page-1 impression volume, but CTR is the bottleneck (~0.2%). The single most valuable move is adding CTAs/internal links from high-impression blog posts into matching service pages; the most-slipped watch item is 'bariatric counseling' (43 imp, pos 16.8, -4.3).
